channel.title: Adventuring Academy
channel.description: Latest releases from Adventuring Academy on Dropout.tv

item.title: Getting Thrown to the Wolves (with Robbie Daymond)
item.description:
Robbie Daymond joins Brennan to discuss his TTRPG origins and eat spicy popcorn.

Duration: 1:13:49

Tags: Adventuring Academy, interviews, q and a, RPG, NPC, game masters, dungeons and dragons, role playing, tabletop rpg, brennan lee mulligan, robbie daymond
